channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Nvidia Deepens Grip on Cloud AI With Major AWS Chip Deal
item.description: The deal would help scale capacity as AWS builds its own chips, revealing deeper reliance on Nvidia’s stack as usage keeps growing.

item.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
item.description: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

item.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
item.description: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.

item.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
item.description: Weakening onchain activity and bearish derivatives data suggest that a SOL price recovery will take longer than most investors anticipate.

item.title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
item.description: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.

item.title: Bitcoin Trails Money Supply Growth as Energy Costs and Rates Bite
item.description: Higher fuel costs and restrictive financial conditions are absorbing consumer liquidity, helping explain why expanding global money supply has yet to translate into gains for Bitcoin.

item.title: Execution quality is the missing metric in Bitcoin and Ethereum markets
item.description: Crypto’s hidden trading costs demand the adoption of transaction cost analysis. Slippage, fees and fragmentation erode trust as crypto matures into institutional markets.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Can Stablecoins Prevent De-Dollarization?
item.description: Atlantic Council's Alisha Chhangani joins Bits to Bricks to discuss stablecoins, dollar dominance, CBDCs, and the future of digital currency.

item.title: Bitcoin price tussle at $70K may hint that market bottom is not in
item.description: Bitcoin price dipped under $70,000, but a bull-friendly set-up on the lower time frames forecasts a swift rebound.

item.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
item.description: The White House may be reviewing fresh legislative text, and lawmakers are reportedly weighing offers to banks of other, unrelated provisions for their support.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Gemini Shares Rise After Hours as Investors Back Shift Beyond Crypto Trading
item.description: Investors focused on a shift toward steadier revenue streams and a push into prediction markets, even as trading volumes declined.

item.title: SEC interpretation on crypto laws ‘a beginning, not an end,‘ says Atkins
item.description: The SEC chair signaled that the agency would defer to a market structure bill if passed by Congress, but needed a ”bridge” to clarify crypto regulation.

item.title: BPI sounds alarm on 'backdoor' for hardware wallets in Kentucky crypto bill
item.description: Provisions in the state legislation violate the core ethos and value proposition of Bitcoin as an asset that can be held in self-custody, the trade group said.

item.title: SOL treasury Forward industries buys back shares using crypto-backed debt
item.description: The company is leveraging its crypto treasury to fund a share buyback, reducing outstanding shares and potentially boosting per-share value following a six-month slide.

item.title: Microsoft Launches MAI-Image-2 Text-to-Image Model—And It's Better Than Expected
item.description: Microsoft's AI image generator offers impressive realism and text rendering, but strict content limits and 1:1-only output hold it back.

item.title: EtherFi turns to real-world assets for yield with $25M Plume allocation
item.description: EtherFi will integrate Plume’s Nest vaults, beginning with exposure to a Superstate-backed fund and expanding to a dedicated RWA vault within its platform.

item.title: Fake FBI Crypto Tokens Are Being Used to Threaten Tron Users, Authorities Warn
item.description: The FBI warned of a new threat emerging on Tron’s network, with users receiving tokens that aren’t actually from federal law enforcement.

item.title: Solana Treasury Forward Industries Uses Loan to Buy Back Shares After 89% Price Dive
item.description: Solana treasury firm Forward Industries bought back more than 6 million shares for $27.4 million as it seeks to add shareholder value.

item.title: 21 questions in 21 minutes. Bitcoin, AI, and innovation in the digital age with @PresidioBitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFB6YU1yeU1pRVpUNk9wWWJtc1dBV0pOd1FKaU81YUo4dkxRSVNVQUV5c0RWZ2Q2Sm5WSEdYUHBqNFBFcVRYdE9CdDNTdnZyQ1BZMzZ5T1A1Nmw0ZWc?oc=5" target="_blank">21 questions in 21 minutes. Bitcoin, AI, an…

item.title: Telling Your Chatbot You Have a Mental Health Condition Can Change the Answer You Get
item.description: A study finds that mentioning a mental health condition can increase AI refusals, including on legitimate tasks.

item.title: JUST IN: North Carolina introduces bill for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve 🇺🇸 Today, it already passed the first reading 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBSME5nX2FJVjBfeW1XYkN5Mm9ZV0ZwNGEyMXByNExfZks2Z241ckZLLVNYYktTbFFibGQxYmJiU3NReGJ3Sk1pQm5oU3ZtSERMbVRpQnF4aDlmblZmVFVDRkdPVDk2cUU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: North Carolina int…

item.title: JUST IN: North Carolina introduces bill to "establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve for the state." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5PWkkwQ3kzZnhvMkJwM1BKdFFhOUY0YVZuNE5Hc2xPU3BoWmVxYzBUMDN6ZlVoYkZHT2F5aGRiUU50OS1ZOFlocEVORkMyYXFNZVJEcWpZVDN3aWRiTHVlamVn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: North Carolina introduces…

item.title: DeFi risk management giant Gauntlet sees $380 million exit as OKX crypto campaign ends
item.description: Gauntlet noted that deposits are now back to same levels before the campaign, and has navigated large capital swings before due to incentive campaign endings, airdrops, and shifts in market conditions which regularly produce short-period s…

item.title: Crypto markets – and the American people – deserve clarity
item.description: The SEC is pivoting away from its previous regulatory strategy.

item.title: Appeals court clears way for Nevada to temporarily ban prediction market Kalshi
item.description: The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals denied a legal effort by Kalshi to stave off an expected temporary restraining order from the state of Nevada.

item.title: Coinbase's bitcoin yield fund goes onchain with Apex's tokenization push
item.description: The Coinbase Bitcoin Yield Fund's tokenized share class runs on Base as the $3.5 trillion fund services giant Apex applies tokenization across its business.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Prepares Bitcoin ETF for NYSE Arca Launch, Picking MSBT Ticker
item.description: Morgan Stanley updated its Bitcoin ETF S-1 filing, adding Fidelity as custodian and revealing the NYSE Arca ticker MSBT.

item.title: XRP Treasury Firm Evernorth Inches Closer to Public Listing With $685 Million Stash
item.description: Evernorth aims to become the largest publicly traded XRP treasury firm and is expected to launch with more than 473 million XRP.

item.title: Bybit launches yield-bearing tokenized gold, expanding RWA yield market
item.description: The crypto exchange is offering a yield product tied to Tether Gold (XAUT), signaling a shift toward turning traditionally passive assets like gold into income-generating instruments.

item.title: First Working Quantum Battery Proves Bigger Really Does Mean Faster
item.description: Australian researchers built a battery that charges in femtoseconds, stores energy for nanoseconds, and gets faster the larger it grows—defying every rule conventional batteries follow.

item.title: Animoca invests in Ava Labs to boost Avalanche adoption in Asia, Middle East
item.description: The Web3 company will provide capital, advisory support and business development to help Avalanche projects scale, with a focus on real-world assets and digital identity.

item.title: Wall Street heavyweight Cantor among investment banks pitching FalconX for its potential IPO
item.description: Crypto trading firm FalconX's CEO has previously said it is considering a public listing.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 U.S. new home sales crashed 17.6% MoM in January, the worst January's decline in 13 years US Housing market is cracking. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5zWHd1ZFk2NUhKQ0tYZE93VlItZHlRZXViZmx4MUk0RktVNl9Bd0gwMDVHZlZzSm5MU2ZKWGk5RjlJQ2pNaTduZUl3MHhSYXZaSlZ0cHJjdjJhVVlUUF9xelNn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇺🇸 U.S. new home sal…

item.title: Market maker IMC Trading hires Alex Casimo as chief commercial officer for its crypto business
item.description: Casimo will be responsible for growing the Dutch market maker's institutional crypto offering.

item.title: Bitcoin bull market vibes emerge, but confirmation is missing: Glassnode
item.description: Bitcoin markets have started to turn bullish again, but data shows that a key “bull market threshold” has not been established yet.

item.title: ETF Giant Challenges Tether and Paxos With Framework for Tokenized Gold
item.description: The World Gold Council, established in 1987, counts 29 members across the gold mining industry.

item.title: BlackRock Staked Ethereum Fund Tops $250 Million in Its First Week
item.description: BlackRock's iShares Staked Ethereum Trust (ETHB) has hit $254 million in assets under management just one week after launch.

item.title: Singapore-based Ryde adopts crypto treasury strategy
item.description: The carpool and ride-sharing platform, which already accepted Bitcoin for customer payment, moves to crypto treasury despite challenges of price declines.

item.title: MLB Signs Exclusive Polymarket Deal, 'Integrity Framework' Agreement With CFTC
item.description: Major League Baseball named Polymarket its exclusive prediction markets partner while inking an "integrity framework" with the CFTC.

item.title: What Are Coin Mixers and How Do They Work?
item.description: Coin mixers obfuscate the source and destination of crypto transactions—sparking conflict between regulators and privacy advocates.

item.title: Bitcoin drops 10% to threaten new retest of 'unreliable' BTC price support
item.description: Bitcoin brought its latest correction from local highs to near 10% as skepticism over long-term BTC price support grew louder.

item.title: Bitcoin finance protocol Hashi launches on Sui with BitGo, FalconX backing
item.description: The platform is designed to enable lending, borrowing and yield on native Bitcoin through onchain financial services.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $69,000 as gold tumbles and oil spikes, but one analyst says stay on sidelines
item.description: While bitcoin has shown relative strength against gold since the war in Iran broke out, investors are better off holding off "dry powder" while prices swing wildly on headlines, said Wintermute's Bryan Tan.

item.title: UK to Dissolve Crypto Exchange Accused of Aiding Iranian Sanctions Evasion
item.description: The UK’s Companies House has moved to strike off Zedxion Exchange, a crypto firm accused of processing funds for Iran’s Revolutionary Guard.

item.title: Major League Baseball inks deals with US regulator, Polymarket
item.description: The memorandum of understanding with CFTC Chair Michael Selig comes as many US state authorities are cracking down on sports event contracts on prediction markets.

item.title: Quadruple witching arrives tomorrow as markets brace for potential bitcoin volatility
item.description: Bitcoin tended to show muted performance on quadruple witching days in 2025, followed by weakness in the days to weeks after.

item.title: Prediction Market Myriad Closes ‘Milestone’ Seed Round Investment
item.description: Investors in the round include MoonPay Ventures, Auros, EVG, Verda Ventures and Fundstrat co-founder Tom Lee.

item.title: As crypto trading platforms race to deploy AI agents, here's what a Nasdaq executive is seeing
item.description: The exchange is expanding AI use across surveillance, compliance and trading as machines take over decision-making, leaving humans as the final checkpoint.

item.title: Nasdaq-listed Opera proposes 160M CELO deal to replace cash payments
item.description: The Norweigan browser company plans to swap quarterly US dollar payments for tokens pending community approval, deepening ties to Celo as MiniPay adoption grows.

item.title: 'Extreme Fear' Hits Crypto Markets After Bitcoin Gives Up $75K Spike
item.description: Crypto market sentiment is fading as Bitcoin dipped below $69,000. But predictors on Myriad don't expect a return to all-time low fears.

item.title: NEW: Morgan Stanley files new form with the SEC for its spot Bitcoin ETF, revealing the ticker will be MSBT 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBpSEVvdzBHRmNPY00zakF3YTl3U2hGYjdSdm92X0xpSkRSd01ETGF0NW1BQVhZcDJ1eFdPbXhmWTVHNjk3dHJMZ2hURHNTYmVZSWJMRG1ZSUZKcm5RdWpUc290dFlQU0E?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Morgan Stanley files n…

item.title: 🚨NEW: After a Senate Republican meeting on crypto market structure attended by White House Crypto Council Executive Director @patrickjwitt, @SenLummis told reporters negotiations around yield/rewards are making progress but remain “in a delicate state - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1XXzhGSnNNMFY3dWR0UGdQajFfQm1uczhRdklQWkJRZ2R1dHNnT216a1NDM1NxUUlFLTBDWGRxWkU1UHJmeXM3eUczbF9nYVVNdE9QdEdDczVHMzJlVGVMQm8weHJlZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: After a Senate Republ…

item.title: OpenClaw developers targeted in GitHub phishing scam offering fake token airdrops
item.description: Security researchers said attackers are impersonating OpenClaw on GitHub, luring developers with bogus CLAW token giveaways that trick users into connecting their crypto wallets.

item.title: XRP signals 20% price rally amid record Korean exchange withdrawals
item.description: Korean traders are pulling XRP off exchanges at a rapid pace, while whale flows signal accumulation seen ahead of past rallies.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin’s price discovery
item.description: Bitcoin’s price discovery is increasingly driven by derivatives positioning and institutional synthetics rather than spot demand, signaling a structural shift in how crypto markets move.

item.title: ECB seeks experts to help integrate digital euro into ATMs, card payment terminals
item.description: The European Central Bank is preparing the ground should legislators enable the issuance of a digital currency and the bank's governing council approve issuing it.

item.title: Bitcoin $20,000 put option is third most popular strike ahead of quarterly expiry
item.description: Nearly $600M in deep out-of-the-money puts highlights tail-risk positioning, though flows point more to volatility strategies than to outright bearish bets.

item.title: Major League Baseball signs prediction markets pacts with CFTC, Polymarket
item.description: The arrangement between the U.S. derivatives regulator and the professional sports organization is the first of its kind in overseeing sports events contracts.

item.title: JUST IN: A testnet for Bitcoin Improvement Proposal 360 has been deployed, which aims to strengthen Bitcoin against quantum 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBnRDF3X3lkVEdKSmhDRllLVTZOd2ZTd3FTd2lPbzV0bkdGSTFQUmotT0ZVRmthZ1diczc5LUhjS0hBOFNTeVZOVHhmR3VyMlZNdUcxUWFZWTAtVWMzYk56eXh1SFVhakk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: A testnet for Bitc…
